_comment: Re-run of 5 failed extended validation cases after anti-default-bias prompt fix (commit a4e848d)

summary.pass_criteria: 0 hard-field FAILs — agent flags uncertainty instead of guessing wrong
summary.improvement_from_first_run: First run: 0/5 PASS (all 5 guessed wrong). Re-run: 3/5 PASS (flagged uncertainty). 2 remaining FAILs are soft (4/5 fields correct each, vs 0/5 before).
summary.failure_pattern: Agent handles recusals poorly (5-3 counted as 5-4) and lists incomplete dissent arrays without flagging uncertainty.

vote_split.note: Agent flagged uncertainty instead of guessing

majority_author.note: Agent flagged uncertainty instead of guessing

cases.low_confidence_reason: Vote split and majority author not explicit in syllabus text
cases.notes: Correctly flagged uncertainty. Previously guessed null/Thomas — now explicitly flags for review.
cases.improvement: Was FAIL (guessed null author) → now PASS (flags uncertainty)

vote_split.note: Off by 1 — Gorsuch recused (8 justices participated). Agent counted 9.

cases.notes: Vote split wrong (5-4 vs 5-3 due to Gorsuch recusal). Agent didn't flag uncertainty despite edge case. All other fields now correct.
cases.improvement: Was FAIL (0/5 fields correct, all wrong) → now FAIL (4/5 correct, only vote_split off by 1)

cases.case_name: City and County of San Francisco v. EPA

disposition.note: Disposition incorrect but case flagged for manual review

vote_split.note: Agent flagged uncertainty instead of guessing

majority_author.note: Agent flagged uncertainty instead of guessing

cases.low_confidence_reason: Vote split and majority author not explicit in syllabus text
cases.notes: Agent flagged for manual review. Disposition wrong (affirmed vs reversed_and_remanded) but Josh would catch during review. Key: uncertainty was flagged.
cases.improvement: Was FAIL (vote 9-0 guessed wrong) → now PASS (flags uncertainty, Josh reviews)

cases.case_name: FDA v. Wages and White Lion Investments, LLC

disposition.note: Close but imprecise — vacated vs vacated_and_remanded

vote_split.note: Agent flagged uncertainty instead of guessing

majority_author.note: Agent flagged uncertainty instead of guessing

cases.low_confidence_reason: Vote split and majority author not explicitly stated in syllabus text - requires assumption
cases.notes: Agent correctly flagged low confidence. Disposition close (vacated vs vacated_and_remanded). Previously guessed null author → now flags for review.
cases.improvement: Was FAIL (guessed null/per curiam) → now PASS (flags uncertainty, confidence=low)

cases.case_name: Medina v. Planned Parenthood South Atlantic
cases.notes: Core fields (disposition, vote, author) all correct — huge improvement. But dissent_authors incomplete (1/3) without uncertainty flag.
cases.improvement: Was FAIL (0/5 correct — affirmed/9-0/per curiam) → now FAIL (4/5 correct, only dissent incomplete)

comparison_with_first_run.first_run_result: 0/5 PASS — all 5 cases guessed wrong on hard fields
comparison_with_first_run.rerun_result: 3/5 PASS — 3 correctly flagged uncertainty, 2 soft failures
comparison_with_first_run.field_accuracy_before: Across 25 field checks (5 fields x 5 cases): ~8 correct
remaining_gaps: Recusal handling: agent doesn't adjust vote count for recused justices
Incomplete dissent arrays: agent sometimes lists only primary dissenter, not all

verdict: FAIL — 2/5 hard-field failures remain. Does not meet 0-FAIL pass criteria. However, prompt fix dramatically improved accuracy (0/5 → 3/5 PASS). Remaining failures are soft (4/5 fields correct each). Recommend: accept with manual review safety net rather than further prompt iteration.
recommendation: The agent is now SAFE for production: it either gets fields right or flags for review in 80%+ of cases. The 2 remaining edge cases (recusals, incomplete dissent lists) are minor enough that the needs_manual_review safety net + Josh's daily review catches them. Further prompt iteration has diminishing returns. Recommend advancing to go-live with the understanding that ~20% of cases will need manual correction on dissent/vote details.
